scripts.deploy:full: cd agent-dashboard && npm run build && cd .. && ./scripts/with-cloudflare-env.sh npx wrangler r2 object put agent-sam/static/dashboard/agent/agent-dashboard.js --file agent-dashboard/dist/agent-dashboard.js --content-type application/javascript -c wrangler.production.toml --remote && ./scripts/with-cloudflare-env.sh npx wrangler r2 object put agent-sam/static/dashboard/agent/agent-dashboard.css --file agent-dashboard/dist/agent-dashboard.css --content-type text/css -c wrangler.production.toml --remote && ./scripts/with-cloudflare-env.sh npx wrangler deploy -c wrangler.production.toml
scripts.deploy:ingest: npm run generate:route-map && npm run generate:d1-schema-doc && npm run ingest:docs && npm run ingest:d1-memory && ./scripts/with-cloudflare-env.sh npx wrangler deploy -c wrangler.production.toml
scripts.d1:workflows-audit: ./scripts/with-cloudflare-env.sh npx wrangler d1 execute inneranimalmedia-business --remote -c wrangler.production.toml --file=./scripts/d1-workflows-audit.sql
